blended.narrative: Grouse Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,660 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
